popularStory.headline: Thomas de Camoys b.1351 and Wives
popularStory.description:
Thomas de Camoys, 1st Baron Camoys of the second creation, KG  (c. 1351 – 28 March 1421),[1] was an English peer  who led the rearguard at the Battle of Agincourt .

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Louches於1352年2月12日出生在英國奧可福爾格亞特 米爾頓時，她的父親William Louches27歲，母親Elizabeth Latimer20歲。她於大約1380年與Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年4月20日在英國英格蘭素可特洛頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國素可特洛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Louches于1352年2月12日出生在英国奧可福爾格亞特 米爾頓时，她的父亲William Louches27岁，母亲Elizabeth Latimer20岁。她于大约1380年与Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年4月20日在英国英格兰素可特洛頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国素可特洛頓。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Louches was born on 12 February 1352, in Great Milton, Oxfordshire, England, her father, William Louches, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Latimer, was 20. She married Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG about 1380, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 20 April 1417, in Trotton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Trotton, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Louches est née le 12 février 1352, à Great Milton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Louches, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Latimer, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG environ 1380, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1417, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Louches am 12. Februar 1352 in Great Milton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Louches 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Latimer 20. Sie hat um 1380 in England Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. April 1417 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Trotton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Trotton, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Louches è nata il il 12 febbraio 1352 nel Great Milton, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, William Louches, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Latimer, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG circa 1380, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 aprile 1417, nel Trotton, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Trotton, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Louchesが1352年2月12日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアグレアト ミルトンで生まれた時，父William Louchesは27歳，母Elizabeth Latimerは20歳であった。約1380年にイギリスでThomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KGと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年4月20日にイギリスイギリススセックストロットオンで65歳で死去し，イギリススセックストロットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Louches(이)가 1352년 2월 12일 영국 스퍼드실르 그리트 미턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Louches(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Latimer(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 영국에서 Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 4월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트로턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 트로턴에 묻혔다.

pt.12 February 1352–20 April 1417: 12 de fevereiro de 1352–20 de abril de 1417
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Louches nasceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1352, em Great Milton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Louches, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Latimer, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG aproximadamente 1380, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1417, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Louches родилась 12 февраля 1352 г. в местности грит милтон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Louches было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Latimer, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG около 1380 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 апреля 1417 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия.

es.12 February 1352–20 April 1417: 12 de febrero de 1352–20 de abril de 1417
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Louches nació el 12 de febrero de 1352, en Great Milton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Louches, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Latimer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG aproximadamente 1380, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1417, en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.
